hero.description: Master's student (Dipl.-Ing.) in Networks & IT Security at JKU Linz, writing my thesis on permission metamodels at Dynatrace. I care about correctness, performance, and shipping things that actually work.

contact.intro: Open to interesting projects, thesis collaborations, and conversations about systems, security, and self-hosting.
